calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Proof Of Bond And Transfer Of Assets To Andrea Leung As Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Proof Of Bond And Transfer Of Assets To Andrea Leung As Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Continued To Mar-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maureen McFadden for Andrea Leung.

Ms. McFadden stated that the assets have not been transferred yet, that Ms. Leung is on vacation and that the bond was filed yesterday. Status regarding proof of bond and transfer of assets to Andrea Leung as Successor Trustee is continued to March 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee For Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Feb-08-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maureen McFadden for Paul Petersen (Petitioner).

Ms. McFadden stated that Mr. Peace received notice of the amended petition and the consent to serve, that Ms. Leung is requesting to waive bond and that the unsigned Special Needs Trust required bond. Ms. McFadden also stated that there is about $35,000.00 in the bank account, that the $560.00 probate expense was paid in the Estate of Brian Petersen, that she is waiting for that Estate to be dismissed, that it should not have been there and that she has a File & Serve invoice for the $20.00. In addition, Ms. McFadden stated that she can file a declaration addressing the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee for Special Needs Trust is taken under submission subject to receiving a corrected proof of service, the declaration and a revised order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Barrientos. Not reported.
